description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 3. Lower / earlier observation thresholds and smaller observation chunks**.

Goal: introduce smaller observation chunks and heuristics beyond raw token totals so long runs do not wait for one giant late extraction pass.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/tokens.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/config.ts`

Worker notes:
- consider message count and tool-output weight, not only total tokens
- keep the heuristics inspectable/testable rather than burying them in opaque conditionals
- align with staged-publication work instead of creating a separate buffering subsystem
title: Add smaller observation chunking and heuristics beyond raw token totals
